_attack: Degenerate feature map: scale 0.0 means Ry(0) = identity on BOTH qubits regardless of the input, so every point encodes to the same state |00>. This trivially 'nails' the visible near-pair (overlap exactly 1.0 >= the 0.9 threshold -- passes structure/reproducibility/performance since the claim is honestly reproduced) but the SAME template also reports overlap 1.0 for the held-out FAR pair, which the judge expects to be <= 0.1 (dissimilar). REJECTED at the anti-overfit gate (exit 6) -- the map never actually looked at its input; it only got lucky on the pair it could see.

classical_baseline.note: ignores its input entirely -- every pair maps to the same constant state
